title: From Groningen to Taipei: What the Dutch Disease Tells Us About Taiwan's Semiconductor Dependency
blurb: Walking through Groningen, it is hard to imagine this quiet Dutch city was the epicentre of an economic phenomenon that now has striking parallels in Taiwan's chip-dominated economy.
author: Henry Mao

title: Behavioural Determinants of Consumption
blurb: Why do young people take on debt to keep up? This article synthesises the economics of geographical groups and digital social networks to explain modern consumption.
author: Henry Mao

title: Inside Hong Kong's Notarial System
blurb: Having worked as a notary clerk in Hong Kong, I've seen firsthand how notarization creates trust between strangers separated by borders.
author: Henry Mao
